title: Abhaile Common Schema Definitions
description: Shared schema definitions used across host.schema.json and service.schema.json

templateSource.description: Jinja2 template source with optional variables

variables.description: Explicit template variables (optional, context is provided automatically)

configEntry.description: Configuration file entry: static file, template, or directory to ensure exists

source.description: Source file path (static) or template object

destination.description: Destination path on target system (absolute path)

oneOf.description: Static or templated file with source and destination
Directory to ensure exists (destination only, no source)
